Shadecrest PMC finest veterans.

The MAG-LD Backpack and Avalon Shield are notoable advancements in the Solano Bionics branch of S.A.D where augmentation is key to advancement of warfare.

 Featuring EMP technology including surge protectors on the shield and bolstering a practical extra limb that can be versatile.
